description: The Kudo-kai is a yakuza group headquartered in Kitakyushu, Fukuoka, Japan, founded before WWII as a bakuto organization named Kudo-gumi by Genji Kudo. It is the largest yakuza group in the Kitakyushu area, known for its militant stance and conflicts with the Yamaguchi-gumi. The group has been designated as a particularly nefarious organization by the National Police Agency and was registered under the Organized Crime Countermeasures Law in 1992.
